• Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated worlds.
  • Features include resource gathering, vehicle upgrades, shop system, teleporters, and real-time multiplayer via MQTT.
  • Offers both singleplayer and online multiplayer modes with cloud save functionality.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { /* ... */ } }
    class ShopSystem { buy(item) { /* ... */ } }
    class NetworkManager { connect(isSingleplayer) { /* ... */ } }

Mega Miner NG is a sophisticated browser-based mining game featuring procedurally generated underground worlds where players can dig for resources, upgrade their vehicles, and collaborate or compete with others online. The game uses advanced canvas rendering with dynamic lighting, a comprehensive shop system for upgrades, and real-time multiplayer functionality through MQTT networking. Players can discover teleporters, craft items, and save their progress to the cloud, all within a polished interface with mobile controls and customizable keybindings.
